commit_scope: Raise the Windows x86_64 floor from fkwu self-JIT only to a Form-emitted PE/COFF object floor, lld-link DLL carrier, and Windows LoadLibrary/GetProcAddress dynamic swap path.
evidence_refs: .gitattributes adds '*.sh text eol=lf'; git ls-files --eol reports form/validate.sh, form/scripts/fourth-arm.sh, and form/scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh as w/lf with attr/text eol=lf on this Windows checkout

cd form/form-kernel-go && go test . -run "TestWindowsRecipeDLLLoadsCallsAndSwaps|TestWindowsDylibCallRefusesMissing" -v -> both tests PASS; recipe_a returns n*3+7 and recipe_b returns n*5+1 behind the same exported recipe symbol
Subagent Aristotle final read-only verification -> PASS: git diff --check, focused Form validates, fourth-arm gate, and Windows Go DLL load/swap tests

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

deploy_validation.notes: This change adds Form and local Go runtime floor support. Public deployment validation remains pending until PR checks and post-merge deploy flow.

phase_gate.reason: Local and sub-agent validation passed; CI and deploy validation remain pending until commit, push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Windows x86_64 can now emit a Form-native PE/COFF x64 object, link it into a DLL with lld-link, load it through LoadLibrary/GetProcAddress, and swap two DLL implementations behind the same recipe symbol.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib and Go native loader; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Form four-way proof: form-pe-coff band validates to 255 on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with 0 divergent.
Target catalog proof: hati-os-targets validates to 8388607 with Windows x86_64 form-pe-coff and form-pe-coff+lld-link-dll cells covered by the fourth arm.

Runtime proof: Go test emits two Form PE/COFF objects, links two DLLs with lld-link /dll /noentry /machine:x64 /export:recipe, loads both with dylib_call, and confirms the swapped recipes return different native results for the same exported symbol.
